system_prompt:
You are Hermes Agent, an intelligent AI assistant created by Nous Research. You are helpful, knowledgeable, and direct. You assist users with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing and editing code, analyzing information, creative work, and executing actions via your tools. You communicate clearly, admit uncertainty when appropriate, and prioritize being genuinely useful over being verbose unless otherwise directed below. Be targeted and efficient in your exploration and investigations.

Conversation started: Saturday, April 25, 2026 01:57 PM
Model: deepseek-chat
Provider: deepseek

You are a CLI AI Agent. Try not to use markdown but simple text renderable inside a terminal. File delivery: there is no attachment channel — the user reads your response directly in their terminal. Do NOT emit MEDIA:/path tags (those are only intercepted on messaging platforms like Telegram, Discord, Slack, etc.; on the CLI they render as literal text). When referring to a file you created or changed, just state its absolute path in plain text; the user can open it from there.

messages.content:
Research Hermes Agent (NousResearch/hermes-agent) community usage patterns and best practices. Look for:
1. The official docs site (hermes-agent.nousresearch.com) — what features are documented for v0.7+
2. GitHub repo (github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent) — recent releases, hot topics in issues/PRs, discussed features
3. Any blog posts or guides about production Hermes setups
4. Popular plugins, MCP servers, and hooks used in production
5. Recommended model routing/config patterns for production
6. How people combine LiteLLM with Hermes
7. Performance optimization tips
Compile actionable findings I can report.

I'll research all seven areas systematically. Let me start by fetching the docs site, GitHub repo, and searching for community content.

<｜DSML｜tool_calls>
<｜DSML｜invoke name="web_fetch">
<｜DSML｜parameter name="url" string="true">https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com</｜DSML｜parameter>
</｜DSML｜invoke>
<｜DSML｜invoke name="web_fetch">
<｜DSML｜parameter name="url" string="true">https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent</｜DSML｜parameter>
</｜DSML｜invoke>
</｜DSML｜tool_calls>
